evidence_quotes.quote: Videogames are extremely important to me, and not just to me - millions of people enjoy them every day.

paragraphs.text: Hello! I support this act and I think it is important in protecting our consumer rights. I am also a supporter of the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative, and I would definitely advise for this act to accomodate the requests of the initiative. I think that Stop Destroying Videogames would be perfect as a part of the Digital Fairness Act. Videogames are extremely important to me, and not just to me - millions of people enjoy them every day. They are an important part of our culture. We should have the ability to own our games, and to be able to preserve them for future generations.
